examples: Linseed oil will soften stiff leather.
Linseed oil is a vehicle for paint.
Archer-Daniels Midland Company was incorporated in Delaware in 1923, successor to the Daniels Linseed Co.
It has come up with a "ladies' loaf" made from soy flour instead of wheat and linseed oil (another phyto-estrogen-rich product) instead of margarine.
